name: narrative-ontology-harness
description: A provenance-aware narrative rehearsal harness for creator-controlled canon, style, and state transitions.

scripts.verify: npm run evidence && npm run evidence:verify && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run privacy && npm run build
scripts.verify:identified: npm run evidence && npm run evidence:verify && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run privacy && npm run build:identified
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify && npm run test:browser
scripts.verify:release:identified: npm run verify:identified && npm run test:browser
